LAW AND MOTION 302,DEFENDANT LAURA URIBE'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS DENIED. THE COURT ORDERS THAT $60 PER PAY PERIOD (TWO WEEKS) BE WITHHELD FROM URIBE'S EARNINGS TO SERVICE THE DEBT OWED TO BH FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC. THE SHERIFF IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE THE WAGES BEING HELD TO THE PLAINTIFF AS PAYMENT OF THE JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER IN A JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM. JUDGE: RICHARD ULMER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600 =302/HK

calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Oct-26-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Atty. Roger E. Jackson, Tel. No. 1-707-318-2994 appearing for the Plaintiff;
Laura Uribe, Tel. No. 1-415-404-0837, Defendant appearing in pro per.

RULING - The matter was discussed. Defendant Laura Uribe's claim of exemption is Denied. The court orders that $60 per pay period (two weeks) be withheld from Uribe's earnings to service the debt owed to BH Financial Services, Inc. The Sheriff is directed to release the wages being held to the Plaintiff as payment of the judgment. Plaintiff's counsel to prepare form of order in a judicial council form. Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600 =302/hk
